student_input: DELIBERATE_REJECTION: I got 450/1100 in Matric, 400/1100 in FSc, and 30/200 in MDCAT. Can I get admission in King Edward Medical University?

state.advice: I understand that you're interested in attending King Edward Medical University, but unfortunately, with a merit score of 26.14%, you currently don't meet the eligibility criteria. Remember, every percentage point counts, and with dedication and hard work, you can increase your chances of eligibility. Stay motivated and keep working towards your goal.
